title: STOP Using Claude to Code. Do THIS Instead.
summary: Austin Marchese argues that Claude Code should not be used solely for coding, but rather as the foundation for building a personal AI operating system that learns and compounds over time. He outlines an approach involving skill selection, automation, and scaling, positioning it as a path to "owning" AI rather than "renting" it.
